list.title: Trial batches
list.subtitle: Scale any saved version out to a manufacturing run. Locks against the frozen snapshot so future catalogue edits cannot rewrite the BOM.
list.empty: No trial batches yet — plan one to see the procurement BOM.
list.delete_confirm: Delete this trial batch? The underlying formulation version is not affected.

create.title: Plan batch — {formulation}
create.subtitle: Pick a saved version and enter the batch size. Use 'Individual units' for bench-scale QC tests so 10 capsules does not scale up to 10 × a full pack.
create.approved_hint: Pre-selected the approved version (v{version}). Override only if you know you need a draft.
create.mode_pack_hint: Production scale — multiplies by the formulation's units per pack.
create.mode_unit_hint: Bench scale — the number IS the raw count of finished capsules / tablets / scoops.
create.batch_size_hint: Number of bottles / pouches / tubs the batch ships. The BOM math multiplies this by the formulation's units per pack.
create.batch_size_unit_hint: Exact count of capsules / tablets / scoops / gummies — no pack multiplier.
create.label: Label
create.invalid_input: Pick a version and enter a positive batch size.
